summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Atlas Core 2.5D AI HUD interface after major dark theme visual overhaul. All core functionality working correctly. Dark tech-noir theme renders beautifully with glass panels, neon glows, and proper color theming for all 4 AI personas.
passed_tests: Dark theme visual appearance - black background with radial gradient, glass panels, neon cyan/magenta glows rendering correctly
Ring 1 AI Presence - All 4 AI nodes (Ajani, Minerva, Hermes, Trinity) clickable and switch color themes correctly
Ring 1 - Ajani (crimson), Minerva (teal), Hermes (silver), Trinity (purple) color themes apply throughout interface
Ring 2 System - All 6 nodes (Settings, UI Skins, Voice Modes, Devices, Memory, Health) clickable and open side panels
Ring 3 Learning - All 7 nodes present (Subjects, Lab, Blueprints, Weaver, Worlds, Archives, Projects) - NO Hyper Axel
Ring 3 - All nodes clickable and open side panels with correct content
Central Core - Glowing animated orb changes color correctly with active AI (crimson for Ajani, teal for Minerva, etc.)
Side Panel - Opens with dark glass styling, displays correct content for AI info and operations
Side Panel - Close button works correctly
Hard Limits overlay - Warning button shows/hides limits card with proper dark styling
Sound toggle button - Works correctly (active/inactive states)
Voice/Mic button - Visible and clickable (browser support dependent)
Hover states - All nodes glow on hover with correct neon colors
Mobile responsive layout (768px) - HUD scales correctly, side panel slides from bottom, date display hidden
Status display - Shows current AI name, title, domain, and state correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is excellent - well-structured components with proper separation of concerns
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
CSS uses CSS variables for consistent theming
Responsive design properly implemented with media queries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Atlas Core HUD interface fully tested. Dark theme visual overhaul complete and working. All 3 rings functional with proper interactions. Hyper Axel successfully removed from Ring 3 (now has 7 learning nodes). Side panel opens/closes correctly for all node types. Mobile responsive at 768px working. Voice recognition depends on browser Web Speech API support.

visual_verification.dark_theme: Verified - radial gradient background (#0f0f18 to #050508), glass morphism panels, neon cyan/magenta glows

ring_structure.ring1: 4 AI nodes - Ajani, Minerva, Hermes, Trinity
ring_structure.ring2: 6 system nodes - Settings, UI Skins, Voice Modes, Devices, Memory, Health
ring_structure.ring3: 7 learning nodes - Subjects, Lab, Blueprints, Weaver, Worlds, Archives, Projects (NO Hyper Axel)
